Question
========
Which of the following is a primary goal of the MOVEL AI 2025-2026 project?

Answerlist
----------
* To develop advanced robotic navigation algorithms.
* To create a new programming language for AI.
* To build a global network of AI sensors.
* To standardize AI ethics across all countries.

Solution
========
The primary goal is to develop advanced robotic navigation algorithms.

Answerlist
----------
* True
* False
* False
* False

Meta-information
================
exname: movel-goal
extype: schoice
exsolution: 1000
